title: Molding, Coremaking, and Casting Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders, Metal and Plastic
description: Set up, operate, or tend metal or plastic molding, casting, or coremaking machines to mold or cast metal or thermoplastic parts or products.

tasks.text: Measure and visually inspect products for surface and dimension defects to ensure conformance to specifications, using precision measuring instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Observe continuous operation of automatic machines to ensure that products meet specifications and to detect jams or malfunctions, making adjustments as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up, operate, or tend metal or plastic molding, casting, or coremaking machines to mold or cast metal or thermoplastic parts or products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Turn valves and dials of machines to regulate pressure, temperature, and speed and feed rates, and to set cycle times.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read specifications, blueprints, and work orders to determine setups, temperatures, and time settings required to mold, form, or cast plastic materials, as well as to plan production sequences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe meters and gauges to verify and record temperatures, pressures, and press-cycle times.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Connect water hoses to cooling systems of dies, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove parts, such as dies, from machines after production runs are finished.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform maintenance work such as cleaning and oiling machines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Smooth and clean inner surfaces of molds, using brushes, scrapers, air hoses, or grinding wheels, and fill imperfections with refractory material.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate hoists to position dies or patterns on foundry floors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cool products after processing to prevent distortion.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install dies onto machines or presses and coat dies with parting agents, according to work order specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Unload finished products from conveyor belts, pack them in containers, and place containers in warehouses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove finished or cured products from dies or molds, using hand tools, air hoses, and other equipment, stamping identifying information on products when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain and move specified patterns to work stations, manually or using hoists, and secure patterns to machines, using wrenches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select and install blades, tools, or other attachments for each operation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair or replace damaged molds, pipes, belts, chains, or other equipment, using hand tools, hand-powered presses, or jib cranes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inventory and record quantities of materials and finished products, requisitioning additional supplies as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Select coolants and lubricants, and start their flow.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust equipment and workpiece holding fixtures, such as mold frames, tubs, and cutting tables, to ensure proper functioning.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain inventories of materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position and secure workpieces on machines, and start feeding mechanisms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Trim excess material from parts, using knives, and grind scrap plastic into powder for reuse.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix and measure compounds, or weigh premixed compounds, and dump them into machine tubs, cavities, or molds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Spray, smoke, or coat molds with compounds to lubricate or insulate molds, using acetylene torches or sprayers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Preheat tools, dies, plastic materials, or patterns, using blowtorches or other equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pour or load metal or sand into melting pots, furnaces, molds, or hoppers, using shovels, ladles, or machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Skim or pour dross, slag, or impurities from molten metal, using ladles, rakes, hoes, spatulas, or spoons.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
